user.title: Connect to Eplucon
user.description: Please enter your API token to connect to Eplucon (https://portaal.eplucon.nl/account/api_tokens).

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API token and/or API endpoint.
error.api: Failed to connect to the Eplucon API. Please check the API endpoint and try again or check the logs for more info.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or check the logs for more info.
error.no-devices: No devices found. Ensure you're device is added to your Eplucon account

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Eplucon is allowed.

init.title: Eplucon Config options
init.description: Current API settings and optional brine statistics

data_description.enable_brine_validity_stats: Create derived brine validity entities and a monthly mean temperature sensor
data_description.brine_pump_threshold: Minimum brine circulation pump percentage before the warm-up timer starts
data_description.brine_valid_minutes: How long the pump must stay above the threshold before the brine input temperature is considered valid
data_description.brine_sample_interval_minutes: How often a valid brine input temperature sample is added to the monthly mean

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API token and/or API endpoint.
error.api: Failed to connect to the Eplucon API. Please check the API endpoint and try again or check the logs for more info.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or check the logs for more info.
error.no-devices: No devices found. Ensure you're device is added to your Eplucon account
